canonical_definition: A two-round dialogue prompting strategy where the first round elicits an answer and the second round explicitly prompts the model to evaluate and state its confidence in that answer.
papers: Thinking Out Loud: Do Reasoning Models Know When They’re Right?
VisualWebInstruct: Scaling up Multimodal Instruction Data through Web Search
